content.rendered:
Testimonial

Find out what others have to say about Michael,

Mike sees through different lenses, and he demonstrates fearlessness.

Don Campbell

All Businesses could benefit from the opportunity to have Mike’s seminar with their associates. Opening up your business to Mike and his passion will allow you to achieve greater success with your clients, your staff and make it a more positive working environment.

Ian MacLeod
My name is Tyson Ralph, I am the General Manager of the Kelowna Keg Steakhouse + Bar. I am writing to provide a professional reference for Michael Haines. In my experience in the hospitality industry, I have had the pleasure of working with several motivational/keynote speakers, and Mike stands out.
Mike is great with our staff, and management team. His passion for the subject matter is infectious. In just one hour, attendees gained a fresh perspective on how to properly show what hospitality should be, with guests that have challenges. Our staff have learned so much from Mike, not only from his presentation but on his regular visits with us at the Keg.
In sum, it is my pleasure to give Michael Haines my recommendation as a keynote speaker. He will deliver valuable information in an inspiring and relatable manner.
Tyson Ralph

It is an honor to provide a letter of introduction regarding the consulting services of Michael Haines, a business consultant that assists enterprises to serve a misunderstood and neglected consumer that represents a significant portion of the population.

Mike is an expert that has enlightened many businesses. He has been received well and his consulting services and the course content he provides businesses, management and employees is a valuable asset.

I’ve known Michael Haines for thirty-five years and find him to be a sincere and valuable friend and associate. I have followed other successful businesses he has run including an advertising and marketing enterprise that served the needs of a number of Kelowna area businesses that I am familiar with. His consulting services come with knowledge and a special insight as a result of his own physical challenges. Don’t let those physical challenges fool you. He is a wise and valuable mentor that provokes attitude change while he instills new insight to everyone he contacts. He is motivated, humorous and a valued educator in his specialized field of expertise. There are few leaders that can provide the package of course material that he’s created that will assist your business in serving a substantial segment of the consumer public your enterprise serves.

Mike’s course and materials will give your management and employees new insights into who they really serve and how to view the consumer public. They’ll discover everyone has a little of Mike in them, that part of self that they never understood. Knowing that special quality of self limitation is not really limiting at all, will make a big difference to each person that your enterprise engages, both internally and externally. Consequently, self limitation will become more of an asset than liability, as shortcomings really become seen as a special quality in each and every individual, as you “Challenge yourself and be great.”

I love and value Mike and know that you will, too! Please take some time to learn what he is and has to offer your business. You’ll be happy you did!

Paul F. Bickert, DC, CIC, CPPA

content.rendered:
About Michael D. Haines

For over two decades, Michael Haines has delivered moving and insightful talks to private enterprise and students from Elementary to College levels. Michael shares his passion for the human experience and overcoming challenges. Michael speaks from experience. He knows a lot about physical, mental and emotional challenges. At birth Michael developed Cerebral Palsy aka C.P. His motor-skills are impaired but that’s never stopped him. He’s experienced more than most even dare to do in a lifetime and from a unique vantage point.

A champion for excellence in customer service Michael delights his audiences with wit, humor and special insights. “Michael sees through different lenses, and he demonstrates fearlessness.” – Don Campbell, Exceptional Communications.

Out-front and on the edge, Mike will help create a unique team experience. Your team members will be touched, moved and inspired.

“Michael sees through different lenses, and he demonstrates fearlessness.” Don Campbell Exceptional Communications “All Businesses could benefit from the opportunity to have Mike’s seminar with their associates. Opening up your business to Mike and his passion will allow you to achieve greater success with your clients, your staff and make it a more positive working environment…"

Ian MacLeod, Manager Milestones

“Mike sees through different lenses, and he demonstrates fearlessness.”

Don Campbell Exceptional Communications

content.rendered:
Hi, My Name is Michael D. Haines.

I go into your place of business, sit down with you and your staff, and through my practical experience impactful my real life wisdom on how to give the challenged person a good feel for what you have to offer.

BOOK A FREE CONSULTATION TODAY!

  • Michael D. Haines, Challenge Yourself And Be GREAT

    Michael Haines, is a man with cerebral palsy, is helping organisations and businesses provide better customer service to those with disabilities challenges.

  • TommusRhodus is an elite author known for offering high-quality, high-value products backed by timely and personable support. Recognised and awarded by Envato on multiple occasions for producing consistently outstanding products, it's no wonder over 40,000 customers enjoy using TommusRhodus themes.


THE DISABILITY FALLACY

In my mind, I do not have a disability, however, society has placed a label on me, and many others, who were born with challenges. We all have challenges. Some are more pronounced than others, and I will go further to say that if you don’t have a challenge, you aren’t living the best life that you can live. All human beings need challenges in order to grow and be better. I will show you how to leverage challenges to make your life or business the best it can be.

CHALLENGE YOUR BUSINESS

In my mind, I do not have a disability, however, society has placed a label on me, and many others, who were born with challenges. We all have challenges. Some are more pronounced than others, and I will go further to say that if you don’t have a challenge, you aren’t living the best life that you can live.

CHALLENGE YOURSELF

The human mind and body are miraculous, in the sense that there is no limit to what one person can achieve. However, we won’t know this unless we challenge ourselves to do something greater than ourselves. Michael has proven that when you believe that you can accomplish anything that you grow into a better person.

CHALLENGE OTHERS

Most people have limiting belief systems, which as a result often put people in positions in life where they are unhappy. We need to help them recondition their mind to believe that they can be great. Michael has proven methods on how you can motivate others to live better lives

.

Why Michael?

Learn how to leverage challenges to make you more successful in life. Find out how to motivate people to perform better in the workplace. Discover how to accommodate people with challenges and see more profits. Hear Michael’s story on how he defied all the odds.
